zh.lifeSummary: Sibil of Northampton Fourneux於1270年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。她於1290年與Richard Fourneux在英國諾廷加姆爾卡爾頓 在 林德利可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1329年在英國諾廷加姆爾卡爾頓 在 林德利可享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sibil of Northampton Fourneux于1270年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。她于1290年与Richard Fourneux在英国諾廷加姆爾卡爾頓 在 林德利可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1329年在英国諾廷加姆爾卡爾頓 在 林德利可享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sibil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Northampton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Northampton (Northants), which is recorded as Hamtun in 917 and Norðhamtun in 1065. The place-name derives from Old English norð ‘north, northern’ + hām-tūn ‘home farm’ ( hām ‘village, homestead’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’). The element norð was added to distinguish Northampton from Southampton (Hants).

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Sibil of Northampton Fourneux was born in 1270, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England. She married Richard Fourneux in 1290, in Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1329, in Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Sibil of Northampton Fourneux est née en 1270, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard Fourneux en 1290, à Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1329, à Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sibil of Northampton Fourneux wurde 1270 in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1290 in Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, England Richard Fourneux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1329 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Sibil of Northampton Fourneux è nata il nel 1270 nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, England. Lei sposato Richard Fourneux nel 1290, nel Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1329, nel Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibil of Northampton Fourneuxは1270年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンで生まれた。1290年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアカールトン イン リンドリックでRichard Fourneuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1329年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアカールトン イン リンドリックで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibil of Northampton Fourneux(은)는 1270년 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1290년 영국 노틴그함실르 칼턴 인 린드릭에서 Richard Fourneux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1329년 영국 노틴그함실르 칼턴 인 린드릭에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sibil of Northampton Fourneux nasceu em 1270, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Richard Fourneux em 1290, em Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1329, em Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sibil of Northampton Fourneux родилась в 1270 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Fourneux в 1290 г. в местности карлтон ин линдрикк, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1329 г. в местности карлтон ин линдрикк, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sibil of Northampton Fourneux nació en 1270, en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Richard Fourneux en 1290, en Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1329, en Carlton in Lindrick, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
